document.title: 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件

sourceSummary.oneLine: A-TCF-5-019-3-A-038 is a validity evaluation report for a 2G, 3G Deco Sheet change request affecting A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a design change validity evaluation record, with attached verification report for new Deco Sheet image confirmation.
keyPoints: The change is classified as Minor.
Request category is 기타(외형 및 색상 변경).
Evaluation content states that a new Deco Sheet image confirmation verification report is attached.
